claims.claim: The **dot product** connects projection to math: $$ A \cdot B = |A||B| \cos\theta = |A| \cdot (\text{proj}_B A) \cdot |B| / |B| = |\text{proj}_B A| \cdot |B| $$ This shows the dot product is the projection **scaled** by the length of **B**.
